---
pagetitle: "Francisco Zambrano - Projects"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="project-grid">

<!-- Project 1: Crea Ciencia 2030 -->
<div class="project-card">
  <div class="card-header">
    <h2 class="card-title">
      <span data-en="Impact of climate change on avocado phenology and native sclerophyllous forest according to access to potential groundwater in the Aconcagua River basin" data-es="Impacto del cambio climático en la fenología del palto y bosque esclerófilo nativo según acceso a aguas subterráneas potenciales en la cuenca del río Aconcagua">Impact of climate change on avocado phenology and native sclerophyllous forest according to access to potential groundwater in the Aconcagua River basin</span>
    </h2>
    <div class="card-badges">
      <span class="badge-status badge-year" data-en="2025" data-es="2025">2025</span>
      <span class="badge-status badge-amount" data-en="$5M CLP" data-es="$5M CLP">$5M CLP</span>
      <span class="badge-status badge-ongoing" data-en="Ongoing" data-es="En curso">Ongoing</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="card-meta">
    <strong><span data-en="Fund:" data-es="Fondo:">Fund:</span></strong> CREA Ciencia 2030<br>
    <strong><span data-en="Agency:" data-es="Agencia:">Agency:</span></strong> <span data-en="ANID" data-es="ANID">ANID</span>
  </div>

  <div class="card-summary">
    <p data-en-html="Climate change is having two primary impacts in Chile. First, through the sustained reduction in precipitation, and second, through rising temperatures. This has led to a significant reduction in water resources, affecting both ecosystems and agricultural production, especially in the Aconcagua River basin." data-es-html="El cambio climático está teniendo dos impactos principales en Chile. Primero, a través de la reducción sostenida de las precipitaciones, y segundo, a través del aumento de las temperaturas. Esto ha llevado a una reducción significativa de los recursos hídricos, afectando tanto a los ecosistemas como a la producción agrícola, especialmente en la cuenca del río Aconcagua.">Climate change is having two primary impacts in Chile. First, through the sustained reduction in precipitation, and second, through rising temperatures. This has led to a significant reduction in water resources, affecting both ecosystems and agricultural production, especially in the Aconcagua River basin.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="card-abstract">
    <div class="abstract-content">
      <p data-en-html="Rising temperatures have an impact by increasing vegetation demand for water and by shifting vegetation phenological development stages. This threatens biodiversity and agricultural security, particularly in crops such as avocado, which require up to 18,000 m³/ha annually in certain areas." data-es-html="El aumento de las temperaturas tiene un impacto al aumentar la demanda de agua de la vegetación y al cambiar las etapas de desarrollo fenológico de la vegetación. Esto amenaza la biodiversidad y la seguridad agrícola, particularmente en cultivos como el palto, que requieren hasta 18.000 m³/ha anualmente en ciertas áreas.">Rising temperatures have an impact by increasing vegetation demand for water and by shifting vegetation phenological development stages. This threatens biodiversity and agricultural security, particularly in crops such as avocado, which require up to 18,000 m³/ha annually in certain areas.</p>

      <p data-en-html="To address this problem, a comprehensive system is proposed that combines groundwater zoning with a phenological analysis of avocado orchards and native forests. The objective is to determine the relationship between potential groundwater zones and the phenology of avocado trees and native sclerophyllous forests in the Aconcagua Basin, using zonation techniques and phenological analysis using remote sensing and artificial intelligence." data-es-html="Para abordar este problema, se propone un sistema integral que combina la zonificación de aguas subterráneas con un análisis fenológico de huertos de palto y bosques nativos. El objetivo es determinar la relación entre zonas potenciales de aguas subterráneas y la fenología de paltos y bosques esclerófilos nativos en la Cuenca del Aconcagua, utilizando técnicas de zonificación y análisis fenológico mediante teledetección e inteligencia artificial.">To address this problem, a comprehensive system is proposed that combines groundwater zoning with a phenological analysis of avocado orchards and native forests. The objective is to determine the relationship between potential groundwater zones and the phenology of avocado trees and native sclerophyllous forests in the Aconcagua Basin, using zonation techniques and phenological analysis using remote sensing and artificial intelligence.</p>
    </div>
    <button class="read-more-btn"><span data-en="Read more" data-es="Leer más">Read more</span></button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Project 2: ODES -->
<div class="project-card">
  <div class="card-header">
    <h2 class="card-title">
      <span data-en="A multi-scale drought observatory for Chile: an early warning system to mitigate agricultural and ecological impacts" data-es="Un observatorio de sequía multiescala para Chile: un sistema de alerta temprana para mitigar impactos agrícolas y ecológicos">A multi-scale drought observatory for Chile: an early warning system to mitigate agricultural and ecological impacts</span>
    </h2>
    <div class="card-badges">
      <span class="badge-status badge-year" data-en="2021" data-es="2021">2021</span>
      <span class="badge-status badge-amount" data-en="$300M CLP" data-es="$300M CLP">$300M CLP</span>
      <span class="badge-status badge-ongoing" data-en="Ongoing" data-es="En curso">Ongoing</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="card-meta">
    <strong><span data-en="Fund:" data-es="Fondo:">Fund:</span></strong> Redes, Estrategia y Conocimiento<br>
    <strong><span data-en="Agency:" data-es="Agencia:">Agency:</span></strong> <span data-en="ANID" data-es="ANID">ANID</span>
  </div>

  <div class="card-summary">
    <p data-en-html="Since 2010, central Chile is experiencing a multi-dimensional crisis due to the pervasive impacts of the ongoing mega drought. We propose the development of a multi-scale drought observatory for Chile that will help mitigate agricultural and ecological impacts." data-es-html="Desde 2010, el centro de Chile está experimentando una crisis multidimensional debido a los impactos generalizados de la mega sequía en curso. Proponemos el desarrollo de un observatorio de sequía multiescala para Chile que ayudará a mitigar impactos agrícolas y ecológicos.">Since 2010, central Chile is experiencing a multi-dimensional crisis due to the pervasive impacts of the ongoing mega drought. We propose the development of a multi-scale drought observatory for Chile that will help mitigate agricultural and ecological impacts.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="card-abstract">
    <div class="abstract-content">
      <p data-en-html="Using a macrosystems perspective, this observatory will integrate global climate and land satellite data with in-situ measurements from national weather stations. It will have two main components: i) monitoring climate and land variables and their impacts on agricultural and socio-ecological systems, and ii) a drought early warning system (DEWS)." data-es-html="Usando una perspectiva de macrosistemas, este observatorio integrará datos satelitales climáticos y terrestres globales con mediciones in-situ de estaciones meteorológicas nacionales. Tendrá dos componentes principales: i) monitoreo de variables climáticas y terrestres y sus impactos en sistemas agrícolas y socio-ecológicos, y ii) un sistema de alerta temprana de sequía (DEWS).">Using a macrosystems perspective, this observatory will integrate global climate and land satellite data with in-situ measurements from national weather stations. It will have two main components: i) monitoring climate and land variables and their impacts on agricultural and socio-ecological systems, and ii) a drought early warning system (DEWS).</p>

      <p data-en-html="The platforms will target three user groups – the general public, decision makers, and the scientific community - and will comply with FAIR data principles to enhance usability of all products." data-es-html="Las plataformas estarán dirigidas a tres grupos de usuarios – el público general, tomadores de decisiones y la comunidad científica - y cumplirán con los principios de datos FAIR para mejorar la usabilidad de todos los productos.">The platforms will target three user groups – the general public, decision makers, and the scientific community - and will comply with FAIR data principles to enhance usability of all products.</p>
    </div>
    <button class="read-more-btn"><span data-en="Read more" data-es="Leer más">Read more</span></button>
  </div>

  <div class="card-footer">
    <a href="https://odes-chile.org" class="btn-primary-custom" target="_blank">
      <span data-en="Visit Project Website" data-es="Visitar Sitio del Proyecto">Visit Project Website</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Project 3: SatOri -->
<div class="project-card">
  <div class="card-header">
    <h2 class="card-title">
      <span data-en="SatOri: Satellite System for Irrigation Optimization" data-es="SatOri: Sistema Satelital para Optimización de Riego">SatOri: Satellite System for Irrigation Optimization</span>
    </h2>
    <div class="card-badges">
      <span class="badge-status badge-year" data-en="2020" data-es="2020">2020</span>
      <span class="badge-status badge-amount" data-en="$200M CLP" data-es="$200M CLP">$200M CLP</span>
      <span class="badge-status badge-completed" data-en="Completed" data-es="Completado">Completed</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="card-meta">
    <strong><span data-en="Fund:" data-es="Fondo:">Fund:</span></strong> FONDEF IDeA I+D<br>
    <strong><span data-en="Agency:" data-es="Agencia:">Agency:</span></strong> <span data-en="ANID" data-es="ANID">ANID</span>
  </div>

  <div class="card-summary">
    <p data-en-html="Water scarcity due to climate change has severely impacted agriculture in central Chile. This project developed SatOri, a low-cost, satellite-based decision-support service to optimize irrigation in kiwi and cherry orchards." data-es-html="La escasez de agua debido al cambio climático ha impactado severamente la agricultura en el centro de Chile. Este proyecto desarrolló SatOri, un servicio de apoyo a decisiones basado en satélites de bajo costo para optimizar el riego en huertos de kiwi y cerezo.">Water scarcity due to climate change has severely impacted agriculture in central Chile. This project developed SatOri, a low-cost, satellite-based decision-support service to optimize irrigation in kiwi and cherry orchards.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="card-abstract">
    <div class="abstract-content">
      <p data-en-html="The innovation integrates two key components: (1) determination of optimal deficit irrigation strategies (RDC) that reduce water use without compromising yield or fruit quality, and (2) estimation of canopy water status through machine learning models based on multispectral and radar satellite data (Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, Landsat 8)." data-es-html="La innovación integra dos componentes clave: (1) determinación de estrategias óptimas de riego deficitario controlado (RDC) que reducen el uso de agua sin comprometer el rendimiento o la calidad de la fruta, y (2) estimación del estado hídrico del dosel a través de modelos de aprendizaje automático basados en datos satelitales multiespectrales y de radar (Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, Landsat 8).">The innovation integrates two key components: (1) determination of optimal deficit irrigation strategies (RDC) that reduce water use without compromising yield or fruit quality, and (2) estimation of canopy water status through machine learning models based on multispectral and radar satellite data (Sentinel-1, Sentinel-2, Landsat 8).</p>

      <p data-en-html="By focusing on plant response rather than indirect climatic indicators, SatOri promises a scalable, farmer-friendly tool for adaptive irrigation under increasing water limitations." data-es-html="Al enfocarse en la respuesta de las plantas en lugar de indicadores climáticos indirectos, SatOri promete una herramienta escalable y amigable para agricultores para riego adaptativo bajo crecientes limitaciones de agua.">By focusing on plant response rather than indirect climatic indicators, SatOri promises a scalable, farmer-friendly tool for adaptive irrigation under increasing water limitations.</p>
    </div>
    <button class="read-more-btn"><span data-en="Read more" data-es="Leer más">Read more</span></button>
  </div>

  <div class="card-footer">
    <a href="https://s4tori.cl" class="btn-primary-custom" target="_blank">
      <span data-en="Visit Project Website" data-es="Visitar Sitio del Proyecto">Visit Project Website</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Project 4: FONDECYT -->
<div class="project-card">
  <div class="card-header">
    <h2 class="card-title">
      <span data-en="The impact of weather variability on wheat and maize production: an improved early warning model for agricultural drought" data-es="El impacto de la variabilidad climática en la producción de trigo y maíz: un modelo mejorado de alerta temprana para sequía agrícola">The impact of weather variability on wheat and maize production: an improved early warning model for agricultural drought</span>
    </h2>
    <div class="card-badges">
      <span class="badge-status badge-year" data-en="2019" data-es="2019">2019</span>
      <span class="badge-status badge-amount" data-en="$100M CLP" data-es="$100M CLP">$100M CLP</span>
      <span class="badge-status badge-completed" data-en="Completed" data-es="Completado">Completed</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="card-meta">
    <strong><span data-en="Fund:" data-es="Fondo:">Fund:</span></strong> FONDECYT de Iniciación en Investigación<br>
    <strong><span data-en="Agency:" data-es="Agencia:">Agency:</span></strong> <span data-en="ANID" data-es="ANID">ANID</span>
  </div>

  <div class="card-summary">
    <p data-en-html="This project developed a near-real-time seasonal prediction model for agricultural drought impact on maize and wheat in central Chile. Using high-resolution satellite data and environmental variables, the model helps anticipate crop losses and improve early warning systems." data-es-html="Este proyecto desarrolló un modelo de predicción estacional en tiempo casi real para el impacto de la sequía agrícola en maíz y trigo en el centro de Chile. Usando datos satelitales de alta resolución y variables ambientales, el modelo ayuda a anticipar pérdidas de cultivos y mejorar los sistemas de alerta temprana.">This project developed a near-real-time seasonal prediction model for agricultural drought impact on maize and wheat in central Chile. Using high-resolution satellite data and environmental variables, the model helps anticipate crop losses and improve early warning systems.</p>
  </div>

  <div class="card-abstract">
    <div class="abstract-content">
      <p data-en-html="The project analyzed high spatial resolution satellite data from Sentinel-2 and Landsat 8 using the sen2-Agri system to retrieve phenology and vegetation indices. A biomass estimation model was developed and validated with field measurements, allowing for reconstruction of historical yield records (2000-2022)." data-es-html="El proyecto analizó datos satelitales de alta resolución espacial de Sentinel-2 y Landsat 8 utilizando el sistema sen2-Agri para recuperar fenología e índices de vegetación. Se desarrolló un modelo de estimación de biomasa validado con mediciones de campo, permitiendo reconstruir registros históricos de rendimiento (2000-2022).">The project analyzed high spatial resolution satellite data from Sentinel-2 and Landsat 8 using the sen2-Agri system to retrieve phenology and vegetation indices. A biomass estimation model was developed and validated with field measurements, allowing for reconstruction of historical yield records (2000-2022).</p>

      <p data-en-html="The prediction model uses satellite environmental data of soil moisture, precipitation, land surface temperature and biomass proxies, with a prediction lead-time of one to six months before the end of season. As the data used are publicly available globally, the models obtained could be adopted around the globe." data-es-html="El modelo de predicción usa datos satelitales ambientales de humedad del suelo, precipitación, temperatura de la superficie terrestre y proxies de biomasa, con un tiempo de anticipación de uno a seis meses antes del final de la temporada. Como los datos utilizados están disponibles públicamente a nivel global, los modelos obtenidos podrían ser adoptados alrededor del globo.">The prediction model uses satellite environmental data of soil moisture, precipitation, land surface temperature and biomass proxies, with a prediction lead-time of one to six months before the end of season. As the data used are publicly available globally, the models obtained could be adopted around the globe.</p>
    </div>
    <button class="read-more-btn"><span data-en="Read more" data-es="Leer más">Read more</span></button>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
